channel.title: AI Tech Daily
channel.description: Your daily 5-minute briefing on the latest in AI and technology.
channel.ns0:author: AI Tech Daily

item.title: AI Tech Daily — June 29, 2026
item.description: Cybercriminals have found a way to exploit the weaknesses of enterprise AI, and it's got everyone on high alert. In the past two years, businesses have been rapidly adopting large language models, or LLMs, to boost support, analytics, development, and internal automation. But as it turns out, this rush to integrate AI has created a disconnect between the assumptions about LLMs and their actual characteristics, leaving them vulnerable to attack. This is where prompt injection comes in, a techniqu...

item.title: AI Tech Daily - June 29, 2026
item.description: Your daily briefing on the latest in AI and technology. Today: AI security vulnerabilities, OpenAI new models, and more....
